subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath been stirred by the fragrances of the All-Merciful and hath turned towards God, the Lord of all worlds, that he may be drawn by the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن تحرک من عرف الرحمن و اقبل الی الله رب العالمین لیجذبه الندآء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
